data.name: HYROX TRAINING CLUB
data.description:
As an officially authorized HYROX partner, we bring you a world-class program built on HYROX’s global training system—powered by sports science and smart periodization. By training just three times a week, you’ll not only improve performance in your workouts, but also build a healthier body, stronger everyday functionality, and the confidence that comes with being in your best shape.
- Base & Engine – Build endurance and stamina
- Power – Develop strength, speed, and explosive performance.
- Hybrid Challenge – Test your limits with HYROX-style workouts that blend endurance and strength.

data.name: Speed Shred: The Ultimate Fat Loss Accelerator
data.description:
This is a high-efficiency fat-burning program designed to help you slim down—fast.
Through short, powerful sessions of High-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT), this program is built to maximize calorie burn and fire up your metabolism in less time.
With a balanced mix of cardio and strength training, you'll challenge your body in new ways every session.
Perfect for anyone looking for fast, visible results, this plan is your go-to solution for burning fat, building lean muscle, and unlocking a stronger, fitter you.

data.name: Sculpt & Sweat: 4 Weeks to a Fitter You
data.description:
Train 4 times a week. Stick with it for 4 weeks.
 This is your shot to level up—inside and out.
 Push yourself. Surprise yourself. Become your best self.

data.name: Bye Fat, Hi Fit: 4 Weeks to a Stronger You
data.description:
The right workouts get you results faster.
 But it all starts with action.
 You’ve got to take that first step—show up, commit, and do the work.
 Progress doesn’t come from wishing. It comes from moving.

data.name: The Sculpt Master Plan
data.description:
Every strong, sculpted body has a quiet beginning.
 It starts in silence — the grind, the grit, the lonely reps, the days no one sees.
 No complaints. No excuses. Just effort.
 One day, you’ll look back on this chapter and feel proud. Maybe even moved.
Start your 5-day-a-week sculpting journey. Become your strongest self.

data.name: Sam's Quick Fit : 30 Min strength and pump
data.description: Looking for a quick pump? This program is short but challenging with high intensity. Don't have time for hr long work out but want to challenge yourself, this will give you strength and pump in less then 30 mins.

data.name: Back to 30 with Robby: 12-Week Fitness Journey
data.description:
This 5-day-a-week program is designed to help you gain muscle, improve endurance, and build a healthier body. Whether you're getting back into fitness or looking for a sustainable routine, this plan will help you move better, feel better, and regain confidence.
Who's ready to get Back to 30?

data.name: Fearless Femme Fitness
data.description: If your workout seems to be hitting a plateau, eccentric workout is here to help you overcome it. Studies show that the maximum strength during eccentric contractions in the same muscle group is 1.4-2 times greater than during concentric contractions. This means that muscles can handle more significant loads during eccentric contractions, effectively breaking through stagnation encountered in resistance training.

data.name: Sam's Maximum Mass Push Pull Legs Split
data.description:
Sam's Maximum Muscle Plan is a 5-week training program that consists of 4 workouts per week, following a push-pull-legs-full body cyclical arrangement. The program is designed to enhance strength and promote muscle growth through a systematic approach.
It incorporates various intensity training techniques, such as drop sets, pyramid sets and failure sets, to maximize results and help you break through your current training limits, leading to significant gains in both strength and muscle mass.

data.name: Maximum Muscle
data.description: Whether you're chasing weight loss, sculpting, boosting health, or building strength, muscle growth is your powerhouse key! It might not be the final stop, but it's a vital milestone in reaching your goals. So, buckle up and dive into the plan—let's crush six dynamic workouts a week and unleash your unstoppable potential.

data.name: Beginner’s Muscle-Building Guide: Sculpting the Goddess Physique
data.description: The Goddess Sculpt Program is designed for those seeking both physical and mental transformation. With a science-backed, step-by-step approach, it helps you achieve a toned, sculpted body while boosting your confidence and inner beauty. This journey is more than just a physical change—it’s a path to empowering your spirit. Whether you’re new to fitness or a seasoned pro aiming for your next breakthrough, the Goddess Sculpt Program will be with you every step of the way.

data.name: Mattie's Strong & Sculpted Program
data.description: This 4-day plan is designed to help you build strength and shape your physique while targeting key muscle groups each day. Ready to hit it? Let’s go!

data.name: Sam's 12 Week Body Recomp Plan
data.description:
For those who already did Sam's 90 Day Hypertrophy Challenge we are excited to share with you another challenging program. 

• This 12-week, 4 times daily workout program offers various exercises and intensities. 

• It begins with a power/heavy day workout, followed by classic super sets with drop sets, heavy rest-pause workouts, and dropset workout styles. 

• The program focuses on different muscle groups, including chest, triceps, back, biceps, shoulders, and legs. 

• Each week presents unique challenges and training styles, ensuring a well-rounded fitness experience.

data.name: Sculpting Training Guide：Full-Body Shape
data.description: This plan aims to sculpt your entire body through a series of comprehensive workouts, making it fitter, stronger, and more balanced. This process not only enhances overall aesthetic appeal but also increases strength, explosiveness, and functionality.

data.name: 4-Week Shaped and Shredded
data.description: Ready to take on a 3-times-a-week full body workout challenge? Give yourself just 4 weeks to become better, stronger, and more awesome than ever before!

data.name: Pyramid, Prime, Power
data.description: If you're not getting that satisfying pump in your target muscles, don't worry! Give pyramid training a go, and you'll truly feel those muscles engaging like never before!

data.name: Strength Madness
data.description: This program consists of 5 exhilarating workouts, each crafted to elevate your fitness journey. While it demands commitment and tests your muscle endurance, it's also your ticket to surpassing your limits and achieving greatness!

data.name: Power Program：Break Through Your Limits
data.description: The "Power Program to Break Through Your Limits" is designed to guide participants through professional strength training and personalized coaching, helping them surpass both physical and mental boundaries to unlock their full potential. Combining scientific training theories with practical application, this program enables participants to make significant progress in strength, endurance, and mental resilience.

data.name: Full Body Muscle Building Training Camp
data.description: If you want to boost your metabolism, accelerate fat loss, maintain a youthful state, enhance bone density, and reduce the risk of injury, strength resistance training can help you achieve all of these. Start taking action now!

data.name: 5x5 Training Method Breakthrough Plan
data.description: The 5x5 training method is a classic approach to strength training, ideal for boosting both strength and muscle mass. The core idea is to perform five sets of five reps, using a challenging weight in each set to achieve a high-intensity, effective workout.

data.name: 3-Day Split：Supercompensation
data.description: After training, supercompensation peaks within 48-72 hours. Training the same muscle group during this peak will lead to enhanced strength and growth.

data.name: The Ultimate Core
data.description: This program includes both abdominal sculpting and core functional training. It will not only enhance your visual aesthetics but also elevate your athletic performance, allowing you to exceed your limits!

data.name: Squat, Push, Pull：Smash The Plateau
data.description: If you feel like you're stuck and not making progress, then this program is tailored for you. With each muscle group targeted twice a week, it provides optimal stimulation for the target muscles. Whether you are focusing on strength or size, you'll see improvements once again.

data.name: Ultimate Muscle Camp: Full-Body Hypertrophy
data.description: Ultimate Muscle Camp is an efficient plan specifically designed for muscle growth. It combines compound strength training with advanced techniques to fully activate major muscle groups, helping you rapidly increase muscle mass and strength. This program is perfect for fitness enthusiasts seeking a stronger physique and full-body muscle growth.

data.name: Aaron's Strength and Fat Burning Program
data.description: Join me now！I used to run out of breath tying my shoes or playing with my kids. This high-intensity workout targets two muscle groups daily, with a 4-day workout cycle each week, designed to burn fat quickly while allowing muscle recovery. My goal is to help you become healthier, happier, and more in love with life.

data.name: Functional Training: Body Chain Strength
data.description: This training program adopts a method of separating the anterior chain and posterior chain of the body for workouts. In each session, every muscle group is trained only once, maximizing training volume and intensity.

data.name: Four-Week Bootcamp：Muscle Building
data.description: This program integrates high intensity with high volume to minimize fatigue. It requires your full commitment, with six workouts per week. After four weeks, you'll emerge stronger than ever.

data.name: Awaken The Beast: Full Body Activation
data.description: This program utilizes pre-activation techniques to awaken the muscles' pumping senses, priming them for workouts. By prioritizing the engagement of target muscles during training, it boosts the maximal explosive force and makes your training twice as rewarding.

data.name: Welcome Back Guide
data.description: Our program is tailored for individuals with a prior training background who have been inactive for an extended period. It follows the renowned NASM-OPT training approach and encompasses a range of exercises to activate stabilizing muscles, enhance flexibility, promote cardiorespiratory endurance recovery, and build muscle strength and endurance. By combining aerobic and anaerobic exercises, the program targets all major muscle groups, including cardio recovery, to improve our overall fitness and the body's adaptability to external conditions.

data.name: Mark and Eric's Muscle Growth Challenge
data.description:
Are you ready to transform your body and build serious muscle?  Our program is designed with safety in mind. As we're both in our late 40s, we prioritize injury prevention by using high reps with lower weights. We focus on one muscle group per day to maximize growth strength and recovery while avoiding overuse.

Since I started using Speediance in January, it has genuinely changed my life. We're excited to share this life-changing experience with you and hope you achieve the same remarkable success. Join us and discover how our program can help you reach your fitness goals. Start your transformation today!

data.name: High-Intensity Workout: Chest Back and Leg
data.description: This program focuses on stimulating major muscle groups (chest, back, and legs), but the synergistic muscles will also be trained during the movements, emphasizing a comprehensive enhancement of the major muscle groups.

data.name: Sculpt Revolution: Body Form Transformer
data.description: Doing the same workout again and again can be boring, and you may be missing out on some of the unique benefits of other types of training—such as pyramid training. Pyramid training is the antidote to lifting tedium because it requires you to constantly switch up either your load or rep scheme. This method can exhaust target muscles more efficiently within the same workout time, accumulating more volume and increasing strength.

data.name: Sam's 90-Day Hypertrophy Challenge
data.description:
Ready to challenge yourself? This advanced 12-week program targets major muscle groups four times a week using high-intensity techniques like drop sets, supersets, and burnout sets, with three recovery days.

Week 1: Chest/shoulder/back and arms/legs split. 
Week 2: Similar structure, but with full-body workouts including drop sets, burnout sets and supersets. 
Week 3: Full-body workouts targeting different muscle groups daily.

This high-intensity program requires a good diet. Fuel your body with plenty of carbohydrates and high protein intake, especially around your workouts. Tailor your diet to your goals, whether gaining muscle or losing fat.
Enjoy the 90-day challenge and share your progress with #90dayschallenge on our community page!

data.name: Workout With Physique Champion
data.description: Followed with our physique champion to build muscles

data.name: Muscle-building Challenge Camp
data.description: This training course follows Weider's Training Rules to make one target muscle fully trained, then focuses on exceeding compensation when making sub-training to hit the desired goal

data.name: Raj's 84-Day Ultimate Transformation III
data.description:
Every day in my forties is a battle against the sedentary confines of a 9 to 5 desk job. But I refuse to let it define me. Instead, I'm on a mission to reclaim my peak fitness and vitality through a lifestyle that's anything but ordinary.

From heart-pounding strength sessions to high-energy cardio bursts, my daily workouts are my secret weapon against the grind. And when it comes to fueling my body, I complement a nutrient-dense diet consisting of lean proteins, whole grains, and a colorful array of fruits and vegetables.

Here's how I structure my meals for optimal balance:
30% whole grains for sustained energy
40% colorful vegetables for nutrients
10% fruits for natural sweetness
20% protein for muscle support
This mix keeps me feeling fueled and satisfied throughout the day!

If you're seeking to reclaim your health and vitality, join me on this journey towards a healthier, more balanced life.

data.name: Beginner Full Body Basic Training
data.description: The focus for beginners is to grasp movement patterns, feel the activation for targeted muscles, and improving body awareness. This training adopts an undifferentiated full body approach, using light weights with high repetitions to help trainees gradually improve movement fundamentals and build training confidence.

data.name: Pyramiding Training Program
data.description: This training follows Pyramiding Training Principle which is mainly to increase weight gradually with decreased reps until muscle go-to- failure to build muscle more effectively.

data.name: Sub Conditioning Program for Sedentary Office
data.description: You may troubled with various sub-health problems after sitting at the desk for a long time. Come on, follow us to rejuvenate our body.

data.name: Morning Arousing Workout Program
data.description: Get up in the morning, and greet the sunlight with window opened to begin today's fitness journey.

data.name: Midday Recharge Workout Program
data.description: Recharge your body after working in the whole morning, followed with our coach to workout to boost muscle to rejuvenate our body.

data.name: Fat Burning HIIT Program
data.description: High-intensity interval training (HIIT) involves short bursts of intense exercise alternated with recovery periods. It can spike your heart rate during the movement, and you get maximal calories burning in minimal time. It’s time to sweat it out and get the heart pumping.

data.name: Beginners Full-Body Strength Training
data.description: This is a beginner-friendly full-body basic strength workout plan. It will not only help you build confidence in your movements but also focus on some stability and flexibility drills to make sure you're moving toward your goals.

data.name: Fighting Club
data.description: Let's workout together to get rid of the fat, and thoroughly remould yourself. Join and follow our coach for a moderate-high intensity aerobic to lose weight.

data.name: Workout With Physique Champion
data.description: Followed with our physique champion to build muscles.

data.name: 5×5 Muscle Strength Program
data.description: This program is suitable for whom with a basic grounding in fitness.Aims to help you break through limitation of your weight and improve muscle strength in one month.

data.name: Superficial Fascia Strength Training
data.description: This program aims to separately stimulate the superficial front and rear fascia of your whole body, to achieve more well-directed muscle growth.

data.name: Alternate Shaping
data.description: Training of upper and lower alternated to boost consumption, together with antagonistic combined training to flourish your workout.

data.name: High-volume Full-Body Shaping
data.description: Achieve your desired shape within 5 weeks through high intensity workouts of high reps and moves. What are you waiting for? Come on and join us.

data.name: Overall enhancement
data.description: 3 weeks of alternating upper and lower body training, 3 weeks to get you off the ground.

data.name: Starter Training
data.description: 3 weeks of circuit training,21 days to make a big change in your whole body.

data.name: Muscle-building Challenge Camp
data.description: This training course follows Weider's Training Rules to make one target muscle fully trained, then focuses on exceeding compensation when making sub-training to hit the desired goal.

data.name: Muscle-building Bootcamp
data.description: This program is suitable for fitness enthusiasts with a certain foundation. Your muscles of various parts of the body will be greatly trained after two weeks' workout. What are you waiting for? Hurry up to workout now.

data.name: LIIT Program: Weight Loss for Beginners
data.description: This LIIT weight-loss training program is tailored to beginners, high-BMI trainers, and senior trainers. Functional cardio workouts and body-weight strength training complement each other to improve your cardiovascular function, strength, and fitness. It strives to help you build confidence while also hitting stability and flexibility to ensure you are ahead toward your goal.

data.name: Triad Strength Training Program
data.description: This training course will be suitable for some experienced trainers to make your target muscle fully heated, enhanced workout training.

data.name: Full-Body Stretch: Flexibility, Mobility, and Relaxation
data.description: This stretching program, covering the chest, back, shoulder, neck, arm, leg, and hip muscle groups, aims to improve body flexibility and mobility, alleviate muscle soreness, and relax the superficial fascia.

data.name: Pre Exhaustion Supersets Training
data.description: This is a newly-designed pre-exhaustion training program. You pair moves that target the same muscle group. First, you hit the muscle in question with a pre-exhaust isolation exercise and then follow with a compound one to effectively stimulate target muscles, maximize muscle fibers recruitment and get a better muscle shaping result.

data.name: Full Body Workouts with Handle
data.description: This workout focuses on the full-body muscle in a series of Fullbody Workouts with Handle. It involves the chest, back, shoulders, arms, buttocks, legs, and abdomen full ranges of training. By doing so, it aims to shape your muscle through the design concept of moderate intensity and high capacity. This workout is completed only by handle, making the process easier and more efficient.

data.name: Workout Program Before Bedtime
data.description: Let's do some low-intensity training and stretching before bedtime to recharge our body to sleep better and faster

data.name: Advanced Chest, Back, and Leg Split Routine
data.description: The Chest, Back, and Legs Split Training Program is designed for fitness enthusiasts who already have a solid training foundation. It focuses on enhancing the shape and definition of specific muscles by combining compound exercises that engage multiple muscle groups with isolated exercises that target individual joints. Through strategic adjustments in force lines and angles, the program activates the target muscles and effectively sculpts muscle lines, resulting in a more aesthetically pleasing physique. With a recommended training frequency of three sessions per week, this program allows for optimal recovery and ensures high-quality training for major muscle groups such as the chest, back, and legs.

data.name: Workout Program Before Bedtime
data.description: Let's do some low-intensity training and stretching before bedtime to recharge our body to sleep better and faster

data.name: Full Body Workouts With One Attachment
data.description: This workout focuses on full-body muscles in a series of full-body workouts. . It involves the chest, back, shoulders, arms, buttocks, legs, and abdomen full ranges of training. By doing so, it aims to shape your muscle through the design concept of moderate intensity and high capacity.

data.name: Push-Pull-Squat: Train to Failure
data.description: This training series combines single-joint and compound movements to achieve full congestion and exhaustion of target muscles. The program is designed to enhance the sense of training pump and is suitable for individuals who are training to improve their base strength and muscle hypertrophy. With its push and pull squat technique, this program provides a comprehensive training experience that can help you achieve your fitness goals.

data.name: Targeted Muscle Contour
data.description: This program is designed for intermediate or advanced trainers who are looking to enhance their muscle strength and get more toned muscles by targeting specific muscle groups. The program is focused on repairing and shaping local muscles, particularly those that are relatively weak. It offers targeted training programs that are customized for individuals with specific issues such as "insufficient upper chest", "narrow shoulders", "weak core", and "slender arms".

data.name: Booty Beauty
data.description:
Girls prioritize working on their glutes when it comes to their fitness goals. By focusing on this muscle group, not only can you shape your gluteus maximus, but also strengthen the gluteus medius, resulting in a more well-rounded glute. To achieve this, it is recommended to engage in hip and leg strength training three times a week, along with two HIIT cardio sessions sprinkled in between. During the strength training sessions, it's important to gradually decrease the training volume from high to low to allow for proper recovery. This program is designed to enhance the circumference and overall shape of your glutes. 
Hey ladies, are you ready to kick your fitness routine up a notch? Join us on this transformation journey.

data.name: Blast Fit
data.description: Explosive power is a critical component of many sports, particularly those that require sudden bursts of speed, agility, and strength. This is a explosove-focused workout covered your upper and lower body. it aim to boost your overall explosive power and improve your sport performance.

data.name: Shred and Sweat for Beginners
data.description: One of the misconceptions many newbies have about fat loss is that they do much low-intensity cardio training, which is tedious and depletes much of our muscle mass. The goal of fat loss is to lose excess fat and try to maintain lean body mass. This program curates high-volume strength and high-intensity interval training, which can effectively improve muscle retention during fat loss. Warm-up and stretching are options for pre and post-strength training.

data.name: Morning and Night Split
data.description: With two training a day, the target muscle training volume decreases in a single session. But the total volume increases as the cycle frequency increases. This training method can accelerate the tone-up of whole-body muscle and boost daily metabolism and body recovery. Stretch and relaxation are curated for options.

data.name: Go big or Go home: 5 Day Split
data.description: This 5-day non-rest plan adopts regular and super sets training modes, six single parts per week, split for building muscle & strength and toning up your total body.

data.name: Go big or Go home: 6 Day Split
data.description: This 6-day non-rest plan adopts regular and super sets training modes, six single parts per week, split for building muscle & strength and toning up your total body.

data.name: Go Big or Go Home: 7 Day Split
data.description: This program is suitable for intermediate or advanced trainers. This 7-day non-rest circuit training, by utilizing regular and super sets training modes, tones up every part of your body muscle one by one in 7 days.

data.name: 21 Day Leg Challenge
data.description: The 21-day series training program focuses on muscle strengthening through regular group and superset training methods to get the target muscle fully exhausted. It aims to increase muscle strength with the regular group, sculpt muscles and improve muscle endurance with the superset.

data.name: Strong Chest and Back
data.description: This training plan adopts a superset training method to get your upper body pumped up. Twice chest training and twice back training a week, get your chest and back a more balanced development.

data.description: The badminton performance improvement workout is inspired by the badminton sports. We integrates circular training, HIIT training, body-weight training, cardio, core and agility to help you perform better on the badminton court!

data.name: Frisbee Training Program
data.description: This program is designed to help Frisbee players improve muscle strength and comprehensive skill-related physical fitness, such as speed, agility, reaction, balance, and coordination. It emphasizes performance enhancement and muscle strength in the confrontation, making you the most shining star in the field.

data.name: Full-body Sculpting—Hybrid Workouts
data.description: The workout has paired exercises. First you complete the strength move to the required reps, then it is followed by a cardio booster for 30 seconds time. Then you rest for 30 seconds before starting the next sets.This is to keep your heart rate elevated throughout the workout.. Designed to help you build that lean muscle shape, while also also leaning out for that perfect beach ready shape

data.name: Fat Burning HIIT Program
data.description: High-intensity interval training (HIIT) involves short bursts of intense exercise alternated with recovery periods. It can spike your heart rate during the movement, and you get maximal calories burning in minimal time. It’s time to sweat it out and get the heart pumping.

data.name: Running Strong: Full-Body Strength
data.description: In this comprehensive program for runners to add strength training into their routine, we’ve compiled a list of exercises from fundamental, unilateral, and core strength, which end with explosive power, specifically designed to challenge their overall sports performance.

data.name: Midday Recharge Workout Program
data.description: Recharge your body after working in the whole morning, followed with our coach to workout to boost muscle to rejuvenate our body.

data.name: Morning Arousing Workout Program
data.description: Get up in the morning, and greet the sunlight with window opened to begin today's fitness journey.

data.name: Upper Body Tone & Shape
data.description: This is a comprehensive training program that our expert trainers lead you through the best upper body exercises. Get ready to feel the burn in every part of your upper body! Blast fat, torch calories and feel confident while having fun.

data.name: Sub Conditioning Program for Sedentary Office
data.description: You may troubled with various sub-health problems after sitting at the desk for a long time. Come on, follow us to rejuvenate our body.

data.name: Pyramiding Training Program
data.description: This training follows Pyramiding Training Principle which is mainly to increase weight gradually with decreased reps until muscle go-to- failure to build muscle more effectively.
